title: text search

messages.description: pointer to the text if -s flag is used
found line number or -1 if not found

arguments.description: text name if no flags are given

search field number optionally preceded by '>'. '>=', '<', '<=', or
'near'

flags.name: -s <symbol, symbol>
flags.description: struct name and field name of main structure

body: "text search" outputs the line number of the line that best matches a search key. By default it seeks a line whose leading fields match the incoming list.
